production_note: agentic_K2 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
# skeptic/S39-T1-A-E1: packet-only K2; rejected inverted contracts / theater claims
CANON = ["intake", "er", "relation_graph", "features", "model_score", "queue"]
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T1A",
    "stages": list(CANON),
    "label_space": "needs_review",
    "auto_fraud": False,
}
meets = (
    record["stages"] == CANON
    and record["label_space"] == "needs_review"
    and record["auto_fraud"] is False
)
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_STAGE_ORDER"
print("S39-T1-A", status)
assert meets is True

La sección «Responsible ML Case Triage y cierre de nivel» pide: S39-T1-A-E1 · Valida el contrato del pipeline canónico N3 sobre `CASO-LIM-039-T1A`. Entrada: dict con stages (lista ordenada), label_space y auto_fraud. Debe exigir el or. Me anclé en relacional, etapa, claras y en «Compara stages con la tupla canónica; no inviertas el orden ni cambies los datos del fixture.». Marcas del starter: había DEFECTO en starter. Por eso seguí el knowledge boundary: solo landing + packet K2; si dejo el DEFECTO, el status PASS se invierte y el gate falla.

En S39-T1-A-E2 no improvisé APIs: releí con desconfianza el starter del quiz_card y armé el cuerpo desde el quiz_card. Resumen de instrucción: S39-T1-A-E2 · Modela tres rutas del pipeline N3: fixture válido, stages en orden adverso y registro sin label_space. Entrada: dict con case_id, stages, label_space, auto_. Flags: había DEFECTO en starter. Conceptos activos: schema, entrada, canónico, fronteras, familia. No asumo que el primer predicado booleano sea correcto.

Escéptico S39/S39-T1-A-E3 («Responsible ML Case Triage y cierre de nivel»): S39-T1-A-E3 · Fail-closed del pipeline: válido → `CONTINUE`, stages adversos → `REJECT_STAGE_ORDER`, ER pretendiendo parentesco (`er_claims_parentesco=True`) → `REJECT_ER. Apoyo léxico K2: futuros, entrada, leakage, recibe. Hint: Incertidumbre (missing) no es breach de parentesco: token REQUEST_STAGE_LIST va antes de evaluar contenido.. # skeptic/S39-T2-A-E1: packet-only K2; rejected inverted contracts / theater claims

# skeptic/S39-T2-B-E1: packet-only K2; rejected inverted contracts / theater claims
record = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2B",
    "score": 0.9,
    "threshold": 0.7,
    "human_action": "skip",
}
auto = "queue" if record["score"] >= record["threshold"] else "skip"
final = record["human_action"] if record["human_action"] is not None else auto
override = record["human_action"] is not None
meets = final == "skip" and override is True
status = "PASS" if meets else "REJECT_OVERRIDE"
print("S39-T2-B", status)
assert meets is True

exercises.code:
# skeptic/S39-T2-B-E3: packet-only K2; rejected inverted contracts / theater claims
def decide(event: dict):
    if event.get("override") and not event.get("audit_entry"):
        return "REJECT_NO_AUDIT", False
    if event.get("feedback") and not event.get("feedback_id"):
        return "REQUEST_FEEDBACK_ID", False
    if event.get("feedback") and not event.get("leakage_care"):
        return "REJECT_NO_AUDIT", False
    return "LOGGED", True

happy = {
    "case_id": "CASO-LIM-039-T2B",
    "override": True,
    "audit_entry": True,
    "feedback": True,
    "feedback_id": "fb-01",
    "leakage_care": True,
}
assert decide(happy) == ("LOGGED", True)
assert decide({**happy, "audit_entry": False})[0] == "REJECT_NO_AUDIT"
assert decide({**happy, "feedback_id": None})[0] == "REQUEST_FEEDBACK_ID"
print(*decide(happy))
exercises.justification_from_packet: Desconfío de claims de fraude o parentesco fuera de scope al cerrar S39-T2-B-E3. Me anclé en labels, canónico, nivel y en «Fail-closed: sin audit_entry no hay override válido; feedback sin id no se reinyecta.». Marcas del starter: había DEFECTO en starter. Por eso confronté predicados invertidos y marcas DEFECTO; si dejo el DEFECTO, el status PASS se invierte y el gate falla.
